lesson.subtitle: Aula 11 -- Scheduling and Confirming Meetings -- Will / Going to
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Rafael de Andrade Brandão | Aula 11 -- Scheduling and Confirming Meetings

listenings.text: Hi, this is Diana from Costa Logistics. Thank you for the proposal. I read it carefully, and I am going to choose the pro plan, as you recommended. Now we need to meet and sign the contract. I would like to schedule a meeting for next week. My calendar is very busy, so we must confirm a time soon. Tuesday morning is not good for me, because I am going to visit a supplier. Wednesday afternoon is free, and Thursday is free too. The deadline for the contract is Friday, so we cannot postpone it again. Please confirm the day, and I will send a calendar invite to your team. I am sure this meeting is going to be quick and easy. Talk to you soon, and thank you again.

Hi, this is Rafael. I just talked with Diana about the contract meeting. She is going to choose the pro plan, so now we will schedule a final meeting next week. Tuesday morning does not work for her, because she is going to visit a supplier. I will propose Wednesday afternoon, and I think she is going to accept it. The deadline is Friday, so we cannot postpone the meeting again. After we confirm the day, I will send a calendar invite to her team. I am going to prepare the contract and the agenda tonight. I am sure everything is going to be ready on time. I will call her tomorrow to confirm the final details. Talk to you soon.

extra_audio.text: Diana reads the proposal and decides to choose the pro plan. She calls Rafael to schedule a meeting to sign the contract. They look at the calendar and check which days are free. Rafael proposes Wednesday afternoon, and Diana confirms it. Finally, Diana sends a calendar invite, because the deadline is Friday.
